entry.title: Re: Settlement of R & D Projects
entry.content: You can just wait to settle the project until after a success or failure is made, then add your settlement rules (FXA for success or CTR for failure) and run settlement.

entry.title: Video Series - Part 8 - Connecting C4C and BTP

entry.title: How do you implement a vulnerabilities scan in your code developed, and the same for the malware?

entry.title: How can I update the material based on the cost center?
entry.content:
For example: I bought 10 Quantities with the price of 10 and the total amount was 100.
I consumed some materials with a total cost of 50 for cost center and then distributed them on primary cost center, so my question is how to update my material bought for the new price of 15 per unit based on the primary cost center.

entry.title: Mexico VAT tax and Vertex
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We use vertex for calculating sales taxes for US and Canada. We are now expanding into Mexico and trying to use Vertex. We are being told that SAP only supports US and Canada for external tax systems. Any one out there that are in the same boat, if yes how did you navigate it. Appreciate your response.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
Hi Jan, @TRAJA 

Thanks for the reply, it's very helpful.

The off day is not a public holiday, and indeed the hours could also differ from day to day.

I think for now the only way this could be managed is adding a temporary WS change before the record is captured, which means rethinking the business process.

Thank you!

Shalene

entry.title: SAC Planning Store wise GL Expenses % divided by Sales
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement for SAP Analytical Cloud (SAC Planning) Expenses planning to happen store wise using the microsoft excel add-in.
Based on the total sales value of the store, the value of each expense GL A/c needs to be divided against the total sales value.  

Expected calculation is shown below 
(Expense GL/ Income of that store)

 

Note - I do know there is a way to write the formula for each GL A/c and divide it by the Income GL group (in the GL Dimension)
But this would be have to be written for each expense GL A/c, which is more like hardcoding the formula for each GL A/c.

Hence, is there a way for the calculation to take the Storewise amount present in the row & divide it by the storewise sales GL grouping, without having the need to hardcode the value for each Expense GL Account ?

@N1kh1l SAP Analytics Cloud for planning Extended Planning and Analysis # any inputs in terms of achieving this requirement

So that whatever GL Accounts the user selects in the filters, system can divide that by the income GL group per store?

 


Regards,
Gavin.

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Integration for SAP Build Workzone Advance
entry.content:
Hi Natalie,

I suspect that your error is in the dataURLSEN and trackingUrlWPB parameters.  These parameters should have values that look like:

https://cutomerABC.enable-now.cloud.sap/wa/WorkareaID

You should replace customerABC with your Enable Now customer name value and don't forget the additional details that must follow your Manager URL, in red above.  The WorkareaID should be the actual ID of the Workarea that will contain the SAP Companion content.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: SAC Planning for Expenses based on Income ratio for the store
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement for Expenses planning to happen storewise using the microsoft excel add-in.
Based on the total sales value of the store, the value of each expense GL A/c needs to be divided against the total sales value.  

CURRENT

Expected calculation is shown below 
(GL Expense/ Sales of that store)

Note - I do know there is a way to write the formula for each GL A/c and divide it by the Income GL group (in the GL Dimension)
But this would be hardcoding the formula for each GL A/c.

Hence, is there a way for the calculation to take the Storewise amount present in the row & divide it by the storewise sales GL grouping, without having the need to hardcode the value for each Expense GL Account ?

@N1kh1l  any inputs in terms of achieving this requirement ?

So that whatever GL's the user selects in the filters & those are visible in the rows, system can divide that by the Income GL group for the store?

 

Regards,
Gavin.

entry.title: Unable to (re)create RFC destinations in solman_setup
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

this is VERY weird !!! Just 2 days ago I did the managed system setup for a newly installed S/4 Hana system. 
EVERYTHING went fine! When checking today, the point about RFC destinations was red !!

When I try to reexecute the step, I am getting the following error:

I repeat that I did not have ANY issue like that just 2 days ago! And of course, when I try to login directly with these credentials in this client, I am able to login without any issue.
I still thought that I already know this problem and I turned to an SAP note that was already known to me:

2694331 - Login RFC: Name or password is incorrect error on Maintain RFCs step - Solution Manager 7.2

Nevertheless it does NOT help 😞 I have tried settings 0, 1, and 4. I even tried resetting the user name buffer in SU56, but none of that helped and here is where I run out of ideas 😞 So, I would really appreciate any help and advice! Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Notification Approval (APRQ)
entry.content: Hola a Todos, como fue solucionado este tema¿? a mi tambien me sale el mismo error en el starter. agracedere su ayuda

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors as User Details Data Source in GRC...
entry.content: Did you find any information in this regard? I too have the same requirement.

entry.title: How to make the "user-responsible" field mandatory in Cost Center Master Data.
entry.content:
Create a Validation rule for Cost center master data.
requirement is to make "User responsible" field mandatory. user can't save the cost center and change the cost center if "User responsible" is blank.

I have created the validation rule in GGB0. 

Prerequisite: SYST-TCODE = 'KS01' AND CSKSV-KOKRS = 'GCON'
Check: CSKSV-VERAK_USER <> ''
Message: Error message; the User responsible field can't be blank.

But its not working.

I have activated the Validation in OKC7 and GGB4.

Please guide me how to make user-responsible field mandatory in Cost center Master data.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Layout input field and button
entry.content: Thank you Geert!!! You are a life saver, definitely smarter than Chat GPT!

entry.title: Re: Unable to (re)create RFC destinations in solman_setup
entry.content:
UPDATE: I took a reference system that I connected to the Solution Manager a few days earlier and where the RFC destinations are green. I created test RFCs from the Solution Manager to both systems. In the reference systems, when doing an authorization test, it goes through fine. On the problematic system, it pops up a login dialog. I have compared the auth/system parameters between the problematic and the reference system. Both have these:

 

I kept trying the SM59 authorization test against the problematic system while changing the parameter auth/rfc_authority_check. It seems that this parameter has no influence on the SM59 authorization test. No matter which value I put (without restarting the system, as it is a dynamic parameter) it kept bringing up the login dialog. Then I have tested the function module RFC_SYSTEM_INFO and that runs with values lower than 4 and fails for higher values, exactly as expected.

And now I truly ran out of ideas and hope you provide me with some fresh tips. Many thanks!

Please spend some more time to give us more information like which APP, which version etc you are using. Unless you put some effort in your questions, I am afraid you will not be able to get a proper answer. Cheers

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Re: non operating expense or income
entry.content: Hello, Nonoperating Expense or Income: This is an income statement account that records expenses or gains from activities that are not part of the main purpose of the company, such as the donation example from the previous figure. Maintaining General Ledger Master Data (sap.com) Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Can any one help me to with these document to be retrieved
entry.content:
<Payload xmlns="urn:com.sap.b1i.vplatform:entity" Role="T" Type="Queue" add="Z.ES.003PostInventoryv1"/>
<Payload xmlns="urn:com.sap.b1i.vplatform:entity" Role="S">
<B1im_multimsg xmlns="">
<Init>
<Server>192.168.3.208</Server>
<Query>GoodsReceipt</Query>
<ObjectType>59</ObjectType>
</Init>
<B1out type="object">
<EskerTrans>
<row>
<iCtr>10</iCtr>
<WarehouseID>WLP</WarehouseID>
<ItemNumber>IN-000000160 </ItemNumber>
<UoM>CL</UoM>
<Qty>2</Qty>
<AmtDelivered>240.0</AmtDelivered>
<AccountCode>_SYS00000004107</AccountCode>
<Docdate>20/08/2024</Docdate>
<ReceiptNumber>5000000153</ReceiptNumber>
<UnitPrice>120.0</UnitPrice>
</row>
</EskerTrans>
</B1out>
</B1im_multimsg>
</Payload>
<vpf:Payload Role="X" id="atom7" ts="2024/08/26 10:47:45">
<b1im_multimsg>
<AdmInfo>
<Object>59</Object>
<Version>2</Version>
</AdmInfo>
<ObjectCode>59</ObjectCode>
<Documents>
<row>
<Comments>Esker Goods Receipt</Comments>
<Reference2>INV-GR</Reference2>
<JournalMemo>Goods Receipt</JournalMemo>
<DocType>I</DocType>
</row>
</Documents>
<Document_Lines/>
</b1im_multimsg>
</vpf:Payload>

entry.title: Direct Asset G/L posting to correct entries
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are on SAP s/4Hana 2022.

in asset legacy takeover, direct postings were made to the G/l account, some direct postings were also made some years later.

currently, there is an imbalance between the asset G/L and the asset history sheet.

what options are available to restore the balance on G/L to what is on the history sheet given that now,no direct postings are allowed on asset G/L.

Thanks,

Millicent

entry.title: Brazil Oubtbound: How to determine J_1BNFDOC — NFE
entry.content:
Hi ,

We are testing creating sales invoices and related documents for Brazilian customers, and we found that some sales invoices have Nota Fiscal: J_1BNFDOC-NFE marked as 'X' and J_1BNFDOC-NFENUM has a value, while others do not.
We would like to know which function/what factors determine the "Electronic Fiscal document" value of an invoice?

Looking forward to your answers.

entry.title: Query Regarding Synchronous Replication Setup During Tenant Copy
entry.content:
Hi  Team,

We are currently migrating the existing PERSON_NAME DB Servers from Data Center A to Data Center B using the Tenant Copy method.

In the **source environment** (Data Center A), we have 3 nodes: 2 PERSON_NAME DBs (Primary and Secondary without automatic failover) and a DR.  
The **target environment** (Data Center B) also consists of 3 nodes: 2 PERSON_NAME DBs (Primary and Secondary with HA auto-failover using Suse Pacemaker) and a DR.

In both environments, **HSR is enabled**, with synchronous replication from Primary to Secondary and asynchronous replication from Secondary to DR.

As tenant copy is being performed from Data Center A to Data Center B while replication is active in Data Center A, I would like to inquire if it is possible to configure **synchronous replication** from Data Center B's Primary to Secondary during the Tenant Copy process. During the cutover, the target tenant database will operate as an independent database.

The reason for this request is that, with a database size of 15 TB and tight timelines, we want to avoid a single point of failure during the go-live and minimize extended replication times between the Primary and HA nodes. We would appreciate any insights on whether this setup is technically feasible.

Best regards, 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding Synchronous Replication Setup During...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

According to your description, it seems like you want to save the time which is supposed to be taken for full replication of the secondary site in DC B after the replica from DC A has been completed.
And, my answer for the scenario is Yes.
You can set up the replication between the primary and secondary in DC B while the tenant copy is being performed.
But, you should take care of a few things.
1) There should not be any events which might affect to the primary site in DC B because of any issue caused by the secondary site in DC B.
Regarding to the possible causes which affect to the primary site, please refer to the section "9. Can problems with system replication impact the performance on the primary system?" in KBA 1999880 - FAQ: SAP HANA System Replication.

2) Stable network status between the primary and secondary in DC B.
Please take a look at KBAs below to make sure the stable connectivity between two sites.
2382421 - Optimizing the Network Configuration on HANA- and OS-Level
2222200 - FAQ: SAP HANA Network (14.What can happen if the maximum transmission unit (MTU) is inconsistently configured?)
1999880 - FAQ: SAP HANA System Replication("8. What are the basic requirements for the SAP HANA system replication network connection regarding throughput and latency?")

3) Please do not register DR to the secondary site in DC B until the tenant copy has been completed.
It could be another burden for the primary site to maintain the asynchronous log buffer for DR site.
So, it is recommended to register DR site after tenant copy is completed.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Could not find the item to pack using RF when creating new hu
entry.content: Hello, can you provide the solution for this?

entry.title: How to disable SAP GUI Ok Command on SAP Fiori launchpad GUI App
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to disable SAP GUI Ok Command on SAP Fiori launchpad GUI App.

We assigned a role for SAP BTP Workzone user, which has SAP GUI Application tiles.

User can access the tile but from ok command there is a option navigate to another t-code by manually providing t-code on the ok command. Where the new t-code role is not exposed.

Is there any option to restrict ok command on SAP Fiori GUI tiles.

 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to disable SAP GUI Ok Command on SAP Fiori launch...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

Please set parameters ~webgui_show_okcode_field=0 or ~noHeaderOkCode=1, in the GUI configuration for the webgui service

SAP Note: 3285810 - SAP GUI for HTML: Hide OK Code Setting Option if OK Code Field Is Turned Off By Service

KBA: 2494749 - "Add or edit ITS Services parameters in SICF - GUI configuration [VIDEO]"

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Generate single PDF of image collection stored in a F...
entry.content:
Not exactly answering your question but some inspiration: 

1. Assuming you have a defined an action such as generatePDF with a parameter for a server side directory

2. In the action implementation you need to be able to read on a the files in the server side directory. Something like: 

const testFolder = './tests/';
const fs = require('fs');

fs.readdir(testFolder, (err, files) => {
  files.forEach(file => {
    console.log(file);
  });
});

Please note that this was stolen from: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/2727167/how-do-you-get-a-list-of-the-names-of-all-files-present-in-a-directory-in-node-j

2. You need to take each of these files and generate a PDF. Looks like PDFKIT will do the job. See the accepted answer here: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/51054745/how-to-convert-multiple-images-into-single-pdf-using-nodejs

3. Now you need to return the PDF. Maybe have a look here to see if this helps: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/returning-a-buffer-file-from-cap/ba-p/13495822

entry.title: How to cancel IndusInd Bank credit card?
entry.content: IndusInd Bank Customer Care  & Email ID - The toll-free number on which customers can credit card contact call is 07362-929739.Dial 073-629-297-39 which is available 24x7, and lodge an official request for cancellation.

entry.title: Re: How to cancel IndusInd Bank credit card?
entry.content: IndusInd Bank Customer Care  & Email ID - The toll-free number on which customers can credit card contact call is 07362-929739.Dial 073-629-297-39 which is available 24x7, and lodge an official request for cancellation.

entry.title: Re: FAGL_SPLINFO_COMPRESS
entry.content:
Hi Sanika,

Data Volume Management function in product SAP Solution Manager, helps customer to identify data reduction potential of managed systems. One typical usage is a Data Volume Management(DVM) section embeded in EWA report. See attached sample screen shots.

I am not familiar with compression report FAGL_SPLINFO_COMPRESS. It seems to be a tool of Finance area. I don't see a direct connection between DVM function and FI report FAGL_SPLINFO_COMPRESS.

Regards,
David

entry.title: Re: 如何移转现金账(零用金)
entry.content:
你好，

可以依照下面的思路，进行一下系统测试和验证。

SSCUI 101003 Maintain Business Transactions
创建一个期初导入的Cash journal business transaction,导入完之后就block住。
创建一个期初导入的科目 作为, Business trans.type C, receipt from bank account

cash journal 过账由库存现金转移到cash journal

期初导入银行存款时候，把这部分库存现金的金额考虑进去。

entry.title: Re: userexit_check_vbap process twice
entry.content:
Hi All,

Because the enhancement is processed twice, Now I use global variables to record the number of entries.

Only when the remainder of the number is 1, a warning message will pop up.

I will mark this issue as solved. If anyone has better suggestions, welcome them, Thanks All !!

Recently we have changed the mail ID of this user, how can we check on which mail the system is sending the workflow.

entry.title: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities
entry.content:
Hi All, 

How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities?

API: Condition Record for Pricing in Sales
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Head (SD_PRICECOMHEAD)
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Item (SD_PRICECOMITEM)

    I use "Custom Fields"  to create and publish a new custom filed in SD_PRICECOMITEM, and use "Adapt UI" to add it in "Manage Price - Sales" .

    When I maintain this field and save this step in UI, I couldn't see any value in custom filed on  "API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV".

     

     What's the next step I should do?

    I don't know how to map this custom field to the correct target table if I need to add a bapi or other method.

     

     

     

     

    Thanks,

    Eric

entry.title: Re: 建立供應商發票時進項稅額是否可以按明細呈現？
entry.content: 不可以，因为税为抬头(Header)字段，SAP标准逻辑就是将各行项目的税金额汇总然后显示在抬头部分。

entry.title: SAP integration CBS handles the sending status change of the payment file
entry.content:
Hi SAP ,

1、Process Payment Files APP

After sending to CBS, a third-party payment platform, the file status changes to "Sent"

If the CBS creation fails, how does SAP re-change the state and re-send the data?

Process Payment Items for Invoices APP

It is not allowed to change the status and other statuses

Unable to resend line items that were not successfully paid

2、How to obtain the API of payment file status, you need to let CBS return the payment status and map the SAP payment status,App as described above

The URL and username are sent in the email attachment

Thanks for the answer

entry.title: 🔴 Discover SAP Event Sources for Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content: SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh is SAP’s market leading event mesh and distributes events in real time in your SAP technical ecosystem and way beyond. Now, what is an event mesh, as sophisticated as it may be, without events? Not much, right? Therefore, we will look into how to expose events from SAP business applications like SAP S/4HANA, SAP ECC and SAP SuccessFactors solutions via Advanced Event Mesh. The session will both provide the theoretical and commercial background as well as provide detailed demos of event-enabling the different backends using different approaches.

entry.title: Re: I have a requirement that Same user can't park and post document (fbv0) can any help by using BT
entry.content:
Hi,

Check SAP Notes 361420

entry.title: 🔴 Use SAP Event Broker for SAP cloud applications to consume business events in a CAP application
entry.content: Learn about event driven architecture strategy at SAP and how to follow a clean core strategy through consuming business events from SAP cloud applications in CAP applications.  Learn how BTP exposes SAP business events through SAP Event Broker for SAP cloud applications for easy consumption in integration and extension scenarios.  We'll guide you through developing broker-agnostic event handlers in CAP, testing them with a local messaging service, and deploying the CAP app with SAP Event Broker to receive events from other systems.

entry.title: Re: Serial number in Stock transport orders
entry.content: currently having a similar concern and looking for a solution

entry.title: Re: Budget assignment to a compensation group
entry.content:
Hi @ShaimaaJamal 

The budget group feature in SuccessFactors is a feature I wouldn't recommend using because it is not dynamic: once employees are added to a group they stay in that group group unless Comp Admin makes the change.

It is described in the Cons here as well as help (and screenshot) on how to assign the budget to a group: : https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/choosing-the-right-budget-configuration-for-your-organization/ba-p/13536803

Also more information here: https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/budget-groups-based-on-custom-field/qaq-p/12374915

In leading practices budget % are assigned to each employee through a lookup table then multiplied against each employee's annualized salary to make up an individual enveloppe which gets consolidated at the form level (budget type = customField, value = 100 then point to the ID of the custom column calculating the individual enveloppe).

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Adding serial number to stock transport order
entry.content: currently looking for similar solution if available

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hello,

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hello, 

Many we had the same issue, you need to delete the ABAP instance from your BTP trial account, then generate a new ABAP instance and create a new cloud project in eclipse. Unfortunately, if you don't have a backup from your components, you must create them again. 

Regards.

entry.content:
Hi SAP

Configuration points

At present, it is found that PL、RU triggers different checksums,here's an example

Maintain Business Partner APP

Some verified data may not be available in other countries，can I change to Unified Configuration?

Thanks for the answer.

entry.title: Re: ODN number appears should appear in the Alt. Refer. field in Customer Credit Memo (DG) documents
entry.content: Could anyone kindly guide as to where the issue could be? Highly appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: What is the best Project Structure -> Scenario -> Cus...
entry.content:
Hi Stefano,

Below are some of the pros and cons for the two approaches

 ProsCons
Single ProjectReporting on Overall Progress of the Project is easier as everything is under one project.If the project is large with many activities in it, handling such a vast project becomes challenging at times
 Easier to create dependencies between activities and understand the floats and critical path for overall projectAuthorization Controls for different teams requires using ACL or development
  Need discipline from teams not to post in each others WBS elements
  Segreggation of profits at indiviudal Company code levels becomes tricky. Need good understanding of the Result Analysis process.
   
Multiple ProjectReporting at individual company code level is easierConsolidated view is lost, you need a BI or custom report to look at the overall progress
 Better management of large projects with many activitiesYou cannot create dependency between activities and have critical path for your overall project
 better authorization controls 
 Easier to setup and get RA etc.

entry.title: 🟢 [ #Keynote ] ABAP Cloud and Generative AI Powering the Clean Core Strategy
entry.content:
ABAP Cloud and generative AI powering the clean core strategy
ABAP Cloud facilitates extensibility for both SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA, employing a clean core approach.
The session will point out how to transition to the sustainable ABAP Cloud development model.

Speakers : Boris Gebhardt and Tim Back

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer) Header and item level data
entry.content: Hello

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer) Header and item level data
entry.content: Hello sivaramaraju_danthuluri , thanks for your quick response i am getting below error while trying to load from index 1 of an object array with length 1, loaded from local variable 'objects'@ line 28 in script10.groovy

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer) Header and item level data
entry.content:
line number 28 in script is 

 Field2(fields[1].trim())

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder import groovy.xml.XmlUtil def Message processData(Message message) { // Log the original body for debugging def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message) def originalBody = message.getBody(String) if (messageLog) { messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("Original Body", originalBody, "text/plain") } def lines = originalBody.split('\n') def writer = new StringWriter() def xml = new MarkupBuilder(writer) xml.root { def recordOpen = false lines.each { line -> def fields = line.split(',') if (fields[0].trim() == 'AB') { if (recordOpen) { xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>") } xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("<record>") recordOpen = true } xml.row { Field1(fields[0].trim()) Field2(fields[1].trim()) Field3(fields[2].trim()) Field4(fields[3].trim()) Field5(fields[4].trim()) Field6(fields[5].trim()) Field7(fields[6].trim()) Field8(fields[7].trim()) } if (fields[0].trim() == 'XY') { xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>") recordOpen = false } } if (recordOpen) { xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>") } } message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(writer.toString())) return message }

entry.title: How we can restrict for Posting in Futrue Date for Tile create supplier invoice Advance and Create i
entry.content:
We need to restrict to the User to Process the document in Future Posting date while using Tile create supplier invoice advance and Create incoming invoice.

Kindly advice how can we do this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How we can restrict for Posting in Futrue Date for Ti...
entry.content:
You may consider using BADI MRM_CHECK_INVOICE_CLOUD to perform custom check when creating supplier invoice. Please refer to this online documentation which lists available BADIs in supplier invoice processing:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/5a27c5f57c3f4dffa6881ca587b22571.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: How to contact IndusInd credit card customer care?
entry.content: IndusInd Bank Customer Care  & Email ID - The toll-free on which customers can credit card contact call is 07362-929739.Dial 073-629-297-39 which is available 24x7, and lodge an official request for cancellation.

entry.title: Re: How to contact IndusInd credit card customer care?
entry.content: IndusInd Bank Customer Care  & Email ID - The toll-free on which customers can credit card contact call is 07362-929739.Dial 073-629-297-39 which is available 24x7, and lodge an official request for cancellation.

entry.title: Re: Using versions with Datasphere Analytic Models in Planning for SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Hi, Please go through this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/using-the-datasphere-odata-api-with-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13525315

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer)...
entry.content:
Hi Ram, Can you please share us the payload so that we can test .

tested the file and it generated XML Yesterday

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer)...
🟢 Developing and Transforming your ABAP Custom Code for Clean Core in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
In this session we introduce the new guidelines for clean core ABAP development in the well-known 3-tier extensibility model in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and on-premise and handle transformation options for existing custom code to ABAP Cloud including outlook of future generative AI support. You will also learn how ABAP Test Cockpit will support governance of your clean core developments.

Speaker : Olga Dolinskaja and Thomas Fiedler

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer)...
entry.content:
Between AB and XY , DT is present i need in output xml different set for each DT
like
<Root>
<Record>
<DT rows>
<DT rows>
<DT rows>
</Record>
<Record>
<DT rows>
<DT rows>
<DT rows>
</Record>
<Record>
<DT rows>
<DT rows>
<DT rows>
</Record>
</Root>

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer)...
entry.content:
Hi Ram,

GroovyIDE  i tested Below payload 

AB, , , ,80000,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,150,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,-150,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,650,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,-650,08,24140,01
XY, , , ,-80000,08,24140,01
AB, , , ,80000,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,150,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,-150,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,650,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,-650,08,24140,01
XY, , , ,-80000,08,24140,01
AB, , , ,80000,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,150,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,-150,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,650,08,24140,01
CD,Sales 05/14/24 , ,000100,-650,08,24140,01
XY, , , ,-80000,08,24140,01  

You can try to check the payload there

entry.title: Re: CSV to XML Converter with(multiple header and Footer)...
entry.content: I did the same with but getting error like *** Error at line: 14 *** groovy.lang.MissingPropertyException: No such property: message for class: java.lang.String at groovyide_com.processData(groovyide_com:14) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at com.groovyide.ExecutorService$1.run(ExecutorService.java:144) Error: TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object i have used below script import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder import groovy.xml.XmlUtil def Message processData(Message message) { // Log the original body for debugging def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message) def originalBody = message.getBody(String) if (messageLog) { messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("Original Body", originalBody, "text/plain") } def lines = originalBody.split('\n') def writer = new StringWriter() def xml = new MarkupBuilder(writer) xml.root { def recordOpen = false lines.each { line -> def fields = line.split(',') if (fields[0].trim() == 'AB') { if (recordOpen) { xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>") } xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("<record>") recordOpen = true } xml.row { Field1(fields[0].trim()) Field2(fields[1].trim()) Field3(fields[2].trim()) Field4(fields[3].trim()) Field5(fields[4].trim()) Field6(fields[5].trim()) Field7(fields[6].trim()) Field8(fields[7].trim()) } if (fields[0].trim() == 'XY') { xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>") recordOpen = false } } if (recordOpen) { xml.mkp.yieldUnescaped("</record>") } } message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(writer.toString())) return message }

entry.title: Sales order with discount amount at header level
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'd like to se discount amount at header level.
For example, there are some items and total amount is 150 dollers.

My customer would like to discount to total amoun like 100 dollers( ＄- 50) or 120( ＄-30) dollers.

I can discount using DEN1 which is "％ percentage discount", but I'd like to discount using "amount".

How can I implement above requirement?

 

Best Regards,

Yuriko Funatsu

#sales order

#discount

#condition type

entry.title: Re: IAS/ SSO login for user with two different SF usernam...
entry.content: Hi, You can remove the unique email address restriction in IAS - goto IAS tenant settings - logon alias - uncheck unique from Email address column. You can have same behaviour how you have in SF login now. Let me know if it helps !

entry.title: Generative AI with SAP – Part 4 – AI Foundation on SAP BTP
entry.content:
This blog is part of the series Generative AI with SAP, which is focused on understanding how SAP is leveraging AI and generative AI across its portfolio.

In this series we are learning:

  • How SAP is leveraging AI and generative AI across it’s portfolio.
  • What SAP Business AI is and how SAP partners and customers can use it?
  • What is SAP AI Core? What is SAP AI launchpad? What is Joule? etc.
  • What role SAP BTP plays in SAP's AI strategy?
  • Hands-on, Real-life examples and many more.

To make it easy to understand, the blog series is divided in small parts. Each blog requires maximum 10–15 minutes to learn.

  • Part 1 – Introduction to SAP Business AI 
  • Part 2 – Components of SAP Business AI 
  • Part 3 – Joule, SAP’s Generative AI Copilot 
  • Part 4 – AI Foundation on SAP BTP [Current blog]
  • Part 5 – Introduction to SAP AI Core
  • Part 6 – Introduction to SAP AI launchpad
  • Part 7 – Get Started with SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad
  • part 8 - Hello World using SAP AI Core
  • Part 9 – Overview of Generative AI Hub
  • Part 10 – SAP HANA Cloud vector engine
  • Part 11 - RAG, a real-life use case using SAP AI Core, Generative AI Hub and HANA Vector Engine

 

This is the 4th blog in the series, where will learn about AI Foundation.

Note: I will publish the subsequent  blogs soon.

 

Let’s first quickly revise what SAP BTP is

In January 2021, SAP introduced a unique and powerful solution offering called SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). SAP BTP is the technical foundation of entire SAP ecosystem and plays a crucial role for all SAP customers and partners.

In other word, SAP BTP is a portfolio of SAP solutions and services that are brought under one umbrella. These services, and solutions helps organizations build a new cloud solution or extend SAP systems.

For more information on SAP BTP, see Explaining SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) to a Beginner

 

AI Foundation

Imagine you are developers/architect working for an SAP customer or partner.

  • You have been assigned to build a new application on SAP BTP or extend an existing SAP solution.
  • You need to incorporate AI capabilities into your application/extension.
  • To do so, you are looking for ready-to-use AI services and tools.
  • You want to make it simple and avoid individual contracts with 3rd party AI vendors and LLM providers.

AI foundation is an offering from SAP, which fulfil all these requirements.

 

So, what exactly is AI Foundation?

AI foundation on SAP BTP is a set of ready-to-use AI services and tools, which:

  • enable customers and partners (and SAP’s own development teams as well)
  • to create AI-powered extensions and applications
  • in a reliable, secure, and scalable way

 

In other words, AI Foundation is the set of AI services and tools on SAP BTP for developers to incorporate AI capabilities into applications/extensions.

Below image gives a high-level picture of AI foundation.

 

AI Foundation on SAP BTP provides an abstraction for SAP Customers and Partners

SAP has partnered with leading general-purpose AI vendors and large language model (LLM) providers to ensure that SAP customers are able to reap the benefit of AI innovations without going into individual contract with 3rd party vendors.

For example, if you need to use GPT LLM, you do not need to buy any separate license, you can access it via Generative AI Hub on SAP BTP. From Generative AI Hub, you can access these large language models from multiple vendors easily.

 

Components of AI Foundation

Below image, shows the major components of AI Foundation.

 

 

Let’s look into each of these components in detail.

 

1. AI services

AI services (aka AI Business Services) are ready-to-use, reusable AI services on SAP BTP.

  • Developers can use these AI services add AI capabilities into their application
  • These services include AI models pre-trained on business-relevant data
  • It covers wide range of business use cases.

 

These AI services are broadly categorized in 3 buckets as shown in below image.

 

Document Processing

AI foundation provides a ready-to-use service Document Information Extraction for intelligent document processing.

The Document Information Extraction service:

  • uses machine learning to automate information extraction processes from a document
  • helps to process large amounts of business documents that have content in headers and tables.

With Document Information Extraction service, we can:

  • Process more documents efficiently with fewer errors and difficulties
  • Increase quality and compliance mechanisms

We can use the extracted information to automate business processes. For example, automatically process payables, invoices, or payment notes while making sure that invoices and payables match.

 

Recommendation

There are 3 services under this bucket to enhance human-decision making:

  • Personalized Recommendation
  • Data Attribute Recommendation
  • Business Entity Recognition

 

Personalized Recommendation is a generic reusable service, which:

  • utilizes machine learning to provide customers personalized recommendations based on their browsing history and/or item description.
  • We can train and use machine learning models to deliver these recommendations across a wide range of business scenarios.

For example, SAP is leveraging this service to process more than 4.2 million learning recommendations for SAP SuccessFactors customers each month.

 

Data Attribute Recommendation service can be used if there are missing values in the dataset. The service:

  • uses free text, numbers and categories as input
  • to classify entities such as products, stores and users into multiple classes
  • and to predict the value of missing numerical attributes in your data records.

With Data Attribute Recommendation we can:

  • Automate and speed up data management processes
  • Reduce errors and manual efforts in data maintenance
  • Increase data consistency and accuracy

 

Business Entity Recognition is a service which helps to detect and highlight any type of business entity in unstructured text. For example, this service can be used to automatically extract the context from incoming emails with invoice inquiries, automating recurring tasks associated with answering queries about the status and payment of invoices.

 

Machine Translation

SAP is being used all over the world and in almost all the languages and that brings an important aspect of Translation of Texts to all the required languages. To accelerate and automate the translation process, SAP offers SAP Translation Hub service under AI Foundation.

SAP Translation Hub is a reusable service to translate content into multiple languages. This service helps you speed up the translation of software texts (e.g. user interfaces) and related documents – with high quality and accuracy. You can use a repository of SAP-approved translations and terminology as well as machine translation, which has been trained with focus on SAP-specific content.

Note: You can find the list of all the AI services and their details in SAP Discovery Center or you can visit the official product documentation.

 

How can SAP Customers/Partners use AI Services?

Customers and partner can integrate the SAP AI Services into their own processes and applications by connecting and calling the provided API endpoints accordingly.

Let’s understand this with an example.

 

Use Personalized Recommendation service to give visitors to a website personalized recommendation

Let’s say we want to use Personalized Recommendation service to give visitors to your website highly personalized recommendations based on their browsing history and/or item description.

Below diagram shows the high-level architecture diagram for this use-case.

 

We can achieve this as a sequence of steps shown below.

Note: You can follow this tutorial to get step-by-step guide for this entire process.

 

Similar to the approach we took for Personalized Recommendation, we can use other AI services as shown in below diagram.

 

Few more tutorials on SAP AI services

Use Machine Learning to Extract Information from Business Documents and Enrich Data

Use Pre-Trained Machine Learning Models to Process Unstructured Text

Shape Machine Learning to Process Custom Business Documents

Use Machine Learning to Classify Data Records

Use Generative AI to Process Business Documents

 

2. Generative AI Management

Second major component of AI Foundation is Generative AI Management. Under this bucket, AI foundation provides an offering called Generative AI Hub – which is an BTP service to explore different LLM models.

Let’s have a close look into Generative AI Hub.

 

What is Generative AI Hub?

 

 

Generative AI Hub helps us to fast-track development of any generative AI apps on SAP BTP. It enables developers to instantly access broad range of large language models (LLMs) from different providers, such as GPT-4 by Azure OpenAI or Open-Source Falcon 40B.

Generative AI – an BTP service to explore different LLM models.

 

We can use Generative AI Hub to orchestrate multiple generative AI models:

  • Either programmatically via SAP AI Core
  • or via the playground within SAP AI Launchpad

 

The generative AI hub also provides tooling for prompt engineering, experimentation, and other capabilities to speed-up the development of generative AI applications on BTP, in a secure and trusted way.

 

Below image shows a quick glimpse of how we can submit a prompt to multiple LLMs and compare the generated outcomes to identify the best-suited model using Generative AI Hub.

Disclaimer: The above image is taken from this blog

Note: For more information on Generative AI Hub, refer to Part 9 – Overview of Generative AI Hub [to be published]

 

AI Workload Management

AI workload management are targeted for developers who wants to build a new AI model from scratch or run an AI workflow or execute an AI asset in a standardized, scalable, and hyperscaler-agnostic way. AI workload management offers all the necessary tools to create AI models, train them, evaluate their accuracy and publish them for inferencing.

Under AI Workload Management bucket, AI foundation provides two services:

  • SAP AI Core
  • SAP AI Launchpad.

 

What is SAP AI Core?

SAP AI Core is a service available on SAP BTP, which offers a powerful AI Runtime. We can use SAP AI Core to train and deploy our AI models cost-efficiently at scale while preserving privacy and compliance.

One of the main benefits of SAP AI Core is that we can choose underlying infrastructure (GPUs, CPU Cores, Memory) from a broad range of plans, as well as avail built-in autoscaling. You can have a quick look on the various resource plan available for SAP AI Core here.

Note: For more information on SAP AI Core, refer to Part 5 – Introduction to SAP AI Core [to be published]

 

What is SAP AI Launchpad?

SAP AI Launchpad is a service on SAP BTP, which can be used to manage and run AI workflows and AI models across multiple AI runtimes (including SAP AI Core).

SAP AI Launchpad provides generative AI capabilities via the Generative AI Hub.

SAP AI launchpad also provides centralize AI lifecycle management for our AI scenarios with a convenient user interface. We can monitor model performance statistics continuously and retrain as needed.

Note: For more information on SAP AI Launchpad, refer to Part 6 – Introduction to SAP AI Launchpad [to be published]

 

Few Important point regarding SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad

  • SAP AI Core is natively integrated with SAP AI Launchpad.
  • The SAP AI Launchpad offers an easy-to-use interface to manage AI workflow administration, processes, and tasks.
  • SAP AI Core can also be accessed by other supported tools as well, such as Postman or programmatically using Python.
  • Technically, SAP AI Launchpad is a multitenant software as a service (SaaS) application on SAP BTP.
  • AI Launchpad can be used to manage multiple AI runtime (e.g., multiple AI Core instances).

 

Business Data and Context

The most important differentiator of SAP system from other AI providers is that – SAP systems contains huge business data of customers. These business data is the key to leverage AI models to solve real business problems.

With solutions like SAP HANA Cloud and SAP Datasphere, SAP helps providing business data and context to the AI models. SAP HANA Cloud vector engine has specifically been designed for generative AI use-case.

 

What is SAP HANA Cloud vector engine?

The vector engine is a new addition to SAP HANA Cloud, a database-as-a-service delivered on SAP BTP. Using SAP HANA Cloud vector engine, we can ground AI with unique business data.

The SAP HANA Cloud vector engine supports efficient storage and processing of vector data. This means we can execute joins, apply filters, and perform selects by combining vector data with various data types, including transactional, spatial, graph, and JSON data, all within the same SQL environment.

 

Here are some key benefits of the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine:

  • Simplify the data architecture, management, and security with the storage of vectors and other enterprise data within the same database.
  • Interact with all types of data (including vectors) using SQL.
  • Gain new insights into data by combining spatial, graph, JSON, and custom SQLScript with vector-based queries.
  • Incorporate vector use cases in solutions with the SAP HANA Cloud clients (including Python), the Python Machine Learning Client for SAP HANA (hana-ml), and CAP.

Note: For more information on SAP HANA Cloud vector engine, refer to Part 10 – SAP HANA Cloud vector engine [to be published]

 

SAP HANA Cloud also provide AI function libraries - Predictive Analysis Library (PAL) and Automated Predictive Library (APL). These libraries allow us to implement classification, regression or time series forecasting scenarios applied directly to the business data.

SAP also provides a solution, SAP Datasphere for data management. SAP Datasphere includes AI in several ways, for example in data integration, data quality & cleansing (such as correcting missing values or duplicates), data governance, analytics (such as detecting trends, analyze historical data, and make predictions), and natural language processing.

 

Foundation Model

Under AI Foundation umbrella, SAP BTP provides a wide range of foundation models that can be used to implement various generative AI use-cases. To provide a seamless experience to SAP customers, SAP has partnered with leading general-purpose AI vendors and LLMs providers, such as Google, Meta, IBM, Nvidia etc.

These foundation models, help ensure that SAP customers keep up with the fast pace of innovation and have the flexibility of choosing right model for their scenario.

 

What exactly is a foundation model?

A foundation model is a deep learning model which is trained on huge amount of data, usually with unsupervised learning. The model can be adapted to perform a wide range of tasks such as text generation, image generation, video generation, sentiment analysis, information extract etc.

Foundation models can be considered as general-purpose technologies that can support a diverse range of use cases. Since these models are pre-trained on vast datasets using powerful hardware and techniques, they can be used to save time and computational costs compared to training new models for each specific application.

Below image summarizes important points about foundation model.

To know more about foundation model, you may refer to What is Foundation Model?

 

SAP Foundation Models - SAP's own foundation model to redefine enterprise AI

Let’s first understand why customers need a foundation model from SAP.

Why general-purpose foundation models may not be enough for SAP customers?

There are many general-purpose foundation models available which are pre-trained on huge data. Under AI Foundation, SAP provides easy access to many of these models such as GPT-4, Llama2, Falcon-40b, Claude2 and many more. While these models offer amazing opportunities, they also have limitations. For example, LLMs may rely on outdated training data and lack company-specific data and business process context.

As an example, imagine LLM as a colleague who is very smart and knowledgeable. This colleague can answer most of your queries. However, he may not know what has happened in the world last year and he also does not have any idea about your company’s internal process and policies.

For example, let’s say you ask a LLM - “What do you think about the offer from our most important supplier last week?”.

An LLM can only work with the initial training data and may nor provide accurate answer.

However, if you provide enough business data and context to the LLM, then you can get the answer you expect.

 

Supplementing this lack of information is where SAP Foundation Model comes into the picture. SAP is trying to adapt the LLMs with the SAP business data and context to create it’s own models which will be best suited for customers.

 

So, what exactly is SAP foundation model?

SAP is designing its own foundation models by combining general-purpose large language models with its deep understanding of business processes and business data. These models will help customers to get context-specific response.

The SAP foundation model will be very useful in all core business areas such as finance, sales, supply chain, etc. It will be able to address questions we face every day in business that large language models cannot answer properly, such as predicting invoice payment dates and supplier delivery quality or proposing efficiency improvements to a business process.

SAP foundation model will also allow for fine-tuning for different scenarios, will further unlock and strengthen SAP’s leading position in embedded AI. Customers will benefit from high-performance models trained on rich SAP data, achieving better predictive results.

 

Please note that customers don’t have to wait for these SAP foundation models to be ready before they can leverage context from business data. There is another approach called Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), which also can be used to provide business data context and give customers better results right away.

Note: For more information on RAG, refer to Part 11 - RAG, a real-life use case using SAP AI Core, Generative AI Hub and HANA Vector Engine [to be published]

 

What’s Next?

Part 5 – Introduction to SAP AI Core [To be published soon]

Disclaimer– All the views and opinions in the blog are my own and is made in my personal capacity and that SAP shall not be responsible or liable for any of the contents published in this blog.

entry.title: Enabling "Phone Calls" and "Appointment" QC Buttons under the +QCButton menu in the Service BO TI
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I want to enable the "Phone Calls" and "Appointment" activities creation buttons under the QCButton menu in the Service BO, which are currently not available in the standard setup.

How can we enable this in the Service Ticket + QCButton menu?

Thanks,

Sibi S

C4C Service C4C Extensibility

entry.title: Re: Need Clarification on SAP GUI Version
entry.content: Hi, sorry, there will be no support for 7.40 anymore.

entry.title: Re: Need Clarification on SAP GUI Version
entry.content: 7.40 End of Support 30.06.2018 • 7.50 Supportende 31.03.2020 • 7.60 Supportende 12. April 2022 • 7.70 volle Unterstützung bis 9. April 2024

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Sales Order text line interface back to Deli...
Re: how to set a constant attribute to strans xml transformation?
entry.content:
in that case i couldn't get a closing 
</issuance> tag

entry.title: Re: We need to create ServiceNow incidents from Solution Manager Alerts
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you please let me know if option to opt out is still happening in 2H 2024? We are finding a lot of limitations in the new Learning Experience. I'm sure other companies are observing this. 

My understanding is that the toggle (turn on/off New Learning Experience) cannot be removed when the option to opt out if removed. If we are giving users the option to see the new learning experience, we might as well implement however there are still issues/limitations that needs to be resolved.

The ILX limitations are here -  https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3389475 

Some of the issues are in Influence Idea -  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/316225

 

thanks

Jenn

entry.title: 🟢 What Software Developers Should Know About Key User Extensibility
entry.content:
Key User Extensibility is a major pillar of the SAP S/4HANA Extensibility concept. It enables business experts to do last mile extensions by their own. But it also provides a lot of value for developers.
In this session, we provide an overview on the key user tools and will answer the question why developers should care for it. We provide examples for extensions that are realized as combination of key user and developer extensibility. An outlook on how generative AI support will change the creation of extensions will round off the session.

Speaker : Thomas Schneider

entry.title: Re: Error converting text solution manager
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Change field name of Change document
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Profit center change in Material Master
entry.content:
Hi Buddy, Please refer to note https://me.sap.com/notes/2552651/E for your concern , especially pay attention to explanation about cloud part below.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Make sure that no stocks in actual AND previous period exist! see SAP Note 30656, with an example how to get zero stocks ( use the Apps 'Display Stock Overview' and 'Stock - Single Material' to view stock available) Select all PO items for the related material and delete them using the app Manage Purchase Orders Archive Production Order for the all items of the related material/plant using the App Analyze Archiving Variants Distribution These hard restrictions are necessary as inconsistencies in account assignment will follow after change of profit center, when proceeding follow up functions of a po item before and after changing profit center. So, all depending purchase order items of this material/plant have to be marked for deletion Use SSCUI '103090 System Messages' to customise type of message raised In the app Manage Your Solution , the messages MM 335 'You want to change the profit center but material stock still exists' , MM 326 'There are still open purchase order items or scheduling agreements' or MM 327 'There are still production orders for the material' are customizable as a Error ( 'E' ) , Warning ('W') or The message can be suppressed (' ') in the SSCUI '103090 System Messages'

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Plus-Pune (August 2024)
entry.content:
Hello Pune Community Members,

The registration for this event has now closed. Thank you for your immense enthusiasm!

entry.title: Re: Missing Query setting in OCC dashboard
entry.content: Dear Customer, From the information you originally shared we're unable to provide a helpful answer as more details are needed. As some time has passed and this question might not be relevant for you anymore, please feel free to submit a new question with more details if you would like someone to have a closer look at this further. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of the Lite Viewer for SAP Analytics Cloud Stories
entry.content:
I admit to Jonshelly,
we have also opened a new ticket.
We do have the behavior for some OVM stories, that for some widget the data are not shown anymore. For this we do the same an use the URL parameter mode=embed, this works fine.
Nevertheless, we expect a solution like, the possibilit to switch enable / disable checkbox in story properties to turn this on and off.
Otherwise, the LIte-Viewer shouldn't bring up any problems, lik ea mentioned.

Best regards
Cengiz

entry.title: Re: Display DOCX/XLSX in Archivelink document viewer from...
entry.content:
Hello,

I've seen your answers.

The viewer inside SAPGUI you use today is possible thanks to the OLE integration between the SAPGUI and the Office applications on your workstation (desktop or laptop).

With the Web, this is not possible anymore, because of the use of a web browser instead of the SAPGUI. This is the same problem with all SAP UIs as from the moment you use the web.

In a web browser, there is no way to have the exact same behaviour that you have today with the SAPGUI. However there are some possibilities to have simllar behaviours. For example if your attachments are stored in SharePoint, then they can be opened directly in the corresponding Office online application (word, excel, powerpoint, pdf, ...). Behaviour is as follows: You are in SAP WebGui, you click on the attachment -> a new window opens and displays the attachment directly in the office online application.

Note that this behaviour requires a specific ABAP addon to store the attachments in SharePoint and set the correct links in the SAP screens. Let me know if this could be of interest for you.

entry.title: Re: Web IDE Could not deploy the builder MTA.
entry.content:
@michael_devine thx for your answer

 

I guess you can try to set the domain to be rammi-laptop-i7.sap.com

 

I try various domains:

  • hana-express.develop
  • rammi-laptop-i7.hana-express.develop

I try with update the /etc/hostname with the domains above or just with the origin entry.

Always the same, but with side effects like: Chrome/Chromium does not work anymore. After reset the /etc/hostname the side effects are gone.

 

What is the full error text when you deploy the builder?

I've a extended thread about with the whole logs. (maybe the forum admin could united both)

entry.title: Re: Error while performing automated test cases
entry.content: Hello Anurag, we’re currently using the demo data of the TDD system for testing test automation. If we go through the process manually, it works without errors. It seems that in this example the plant is not entered into the appropriate field by the system: Best regards Sebastian

entry.title: Lable using DYMO printer need to print in Landscape or rotate into 90 degree
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have created lable using smartforms & printing this with the help of DYMO printer.

Currently this text is print in horizontally, We need in Vertical or landscape mode.

Please help & tell us any suggestion.

PFA.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Anjali Gore.
